title: Check Card v1 — Foundation Verification Stub
intent: Independently verify that the foundation set (spec + schema + boot) is correct, not just internally consistent. A deterministic boot can be deterministically wrong — this card catches that.

context.problem: Boot proves integrity (I got this hash). Check proves correctness (this hash means what it should). Without an independent verifier, the system can be self-consistent but wrong.
context.scope: Minimal stub: 4 assertions. Not a full test suite. The first metacognitive primitive.

transform.input_shape: A booted substrate with genesis state + the 3 foundation cards (spec, schema, boot).
transform.sieve_rule: Run 4 verification checks. Emit structured pass/fail results. Any failure blocks the system from accepting further cards.
transform.output_shape: Check result artifact: 4 assertions with pass/fail + evidence.

outcome.output_success: All 4 checks pass. Check result artifact is written to checks/ directory.
outcome.outcome_success: The foundation is proven correct, not just consistent. The system can be trusted to accept new cards.

constraints: Check must be independent of boot — it cannot rely on boot's own output to verify boot.
Check must be deterministic and reproducible.
Check must fail-closed: any assertion failure means the foundation is not proven.
Check result must be a structured artifact, not prose.

governance.note: Check cards are the system's self-awareness. A failed check should produce a next-action recommendation, not just a failure report.

checks.description: Spec card validates against the schema card's schema_instance.
checks.when: Validate spec card against JSON Schema.

checks.description: Genesis hash matches expected value computed from canonical inputs.
checks.when: Recompute genesis hash from canonical JSON of spec + schema + boot + genesis event.
checks.then: Computed hash matches stored genesis hash exactly.

checks.description: All spec card invariants hold in the genesis state.
checks.given: Genesis state + spec card invariants list.
checks.when: Evaluate each invariant against genesis state.
checks.then: All invariants pass. No canonical state exists without ratification (genesis is proposed, not ratified).

checks.description: Re-running boot from scratch produces identical genesis hash.
checks.when: Boot a second time into a clean directory.
checks.then: Genesis hash from second boot == genesis hash from first boot.

properties.next_action: string — what to do if any check fails

evaluation.output_success: Check result artifact written with 4 assertions, all pass.
evaluation.outcome_success: Foundation is independently verified. System is ready for use.

failure_modes: Check passes when it shouldn't — false positive (spec violation undetected).
Check fails on valid foundation — false negative (overly strict assertion).
Check result not written — silent failure.
Check depends on boot internals — loses independence.

degrade_policy.rule: The 4 checks and the result shape must persist. A cold agent must be able to run verification from this card alone.
